NCT00721409.label: Outcome
NCT00721409.text: Median progression-free survival was 10.2 months (95% CI 5.7-12.6) for the letrozole group and 20.2 months (13.8-27.5) for the palbociclib plus letrozole group (HR 0.488, 95% CI 0.319-0.748; one-sided p=0.0004).

NCT01740427.label: Outcome
NCT01740427.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT01740427.text: RESULTS: The median progression-free survival was 24.8 months (95% confidence interval [CI], 22.1 to not estimable) in the palbociclib-letrozole group, as compared with 14.5 months (95% CI, 12.9 to 17.1) in the placebo-letrozole group (hazard ratio for disease progression or death, 0.58; 95% CI, 0.46 to 0.72; P<0.001).

NCT01942135.label: Outcome
NCT01942135.text: FINDINGS: Between Oct 7, 2013, and Aug 26, 2014, 521 patients were randomly assigned, 347 to fulvestrant plus palbociclib and 174 to fulvestrant plus placebo.

NCT01958021.label: Outcome
NCT01958021.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT01958021.text: RESULTS: The duration of progression-free survival was significantly longer in the ribociclib group than in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.56; 95% CI, 0.43 to 0.72; P=3.29×10-6 for superiority).

NCT02422615.label: Outcome
NCT02422615.source: Journal of clinical oncology : official journal of the American Society of Clinical Oncology
NCT02422615.text: Results A total of 484 postmenopausal women were randomly assigned to ribociclib plus fulvestrant, and 242 were assigned to placebo plus fulvestrant.

NCT02278120.label: Outcome
NCT02278120.text: Grade 3 or 4 adverse events reported in more than 10% of patients in either group were neutropenia (203 [61%] of 335 patients in the ribociclib group and 12 [4%] of 337 in the placebo group) and leucopenia (48 [14%] and four [1%]).

NCT02107703.label: Outcome
NCT02107703.source: Journal of clinical oncology : official journal of the American Society of Clinical Oncology
NCT02107703.text: Abemaciclib plus fulvestrant significantly extended PFS versus fulvestrant alone (median, 16.4 v 9.3 months; hazard ratio, 0.553; 95% CI, 0.449 to 0.681; P < .001).
